title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 65.
content:
There was an Old Man of the Dee,
    Who was sadly annoyed by a flea;
    When he said, "I will scratch it,"
    They gave him a hatchet,
    Which grieved that Old Man of the Dee.
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 65." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
